features: Alka-Seltzer water-soluble tablets are rapidly absorbed for fast, effective relief from general pain, fever, and inflammation
description: Product Description Alka-Seltzer water-soluble tablets are rapidly absorbed for fast, effective relief from general pain, fever, and inflammation. Including: headache and migraine, period pain, rhuematic & muscular pain, toothache, sore throat, nerve pain, symptomatic relief of colds & flu. Ingredients Buffered aspirin 325 mg Directions Directions: Alka-Seltzer must always be dissolved in water before taking. Dosage: Adults and children aged 16 and over: 2 tablets every 4 hours, if necessary. Maximum dosage: Do not take more than 8 tablets in 24 hours. The dosages should not be continued for more than three days without consulting your doctor. Do not give to children aged under 16 years, unless on the advice of a doctor. If symptoms persist consult your doctor. Please read the enclosed leaflet carefully. DO NOT EXCEED THE STATED DOSE. CONTAINS ASPIRIN. Manufacturer's Description FAST RELIEF. HEADACHE WITH UPSET STOMACH. For fast and effective relief from headache with upset stomach particularly when due to too much to eat or drink. Alka-Seltzer is especially effective when taken before bed and again in the morning. Also suitable for relief of general pain such as migraine and period pains, rheumatic and muscular pain and the symptomatic relief of colds and flu. Alka-Seltzer is a registered trademark of Bayer Healthcare LLC, USA. Manufacturer Contact Information 400 South Oak Way, Reading, RG2 6AD, United Kingdom See more
